metadata.description: Singapore Mathematics curriculum from Primary 1 through JC H2, with prerequisite ordering and full subtopic coverage

nodes.label: Counting to 10
nodes.description: Count objects up to 10; read and write numerals 0 to 10; compare and order numbers

nodes.label: Number Bonds
nodes.description: Number bonds within 10; composing and decomposing numbers; part-whole relationships

nodes.label: Addition Within 20
nodes.description: Addition facts within 20; adding by counting on; addition stories and number sentences

nodes.label: Subtraction Within 20
nodes.description: Subtraction facts within 20; subtracting by counting back; subtraction stories and number sentences

nodes.label: Numbers to 40
nodes.description: Count, read and write numbers to 40; place value in tens and ones; compare and order

nodes.label: Addition & Subtraction Within 40
nodes.description: Addition and subtraction of numbers within 40; solving one-step word problems

nodes.label: Numbers to 100
nodes.description: Count, read and write numbers to 100; place value; compare, order and patterns

nodes.label: Addition & Subtraction Within 100
nodes.description: Addition and subtraction within 100 without regrouping; solving word problems

nodes.label: Ordinal Numbers
nodes.description: Use ordinal numbers (first to tenth) to indicate position

nodes.label: Length
nodes.description: Compare and measure lengths using non-standard units; use vocabulary of length

nodes.label: Mass
nodes.description: Compare masses using a balance; use vocabulary of mass (heavy, light, heavier, lighter)

nodes.label: Time
nodes.description: Tell time to the hour and half hour; use vocabulary of time (morning, afternoon, days of week)

nodes.label: 2D Shapes
nodes.description: Identify and name basic 2D shapes (circle, triangle, rectangle, square); describe and classify

nodes.label: 3D Shapes
nodes.description: Identify and name basic 3D shapes (cube, cuboid, cone, cylinder); describe features

nodes.label: Patterns
nodes.description: Recognise, describe and extend patterns with shapes, colours and numbers

nodes.label: Picture Graphs
nodes.description: Read and interpret data from picture graphs with one-to-one representation

nodes.label: Money
nodes.description: Identify Singapore coins and notes; count money; solve simple money problems

nodes.label: Numbers to 1000
nodes.description: Count, read and write numbers to 1000; place value (hundreds, tens, ones); compare and order

nodes.label: Addition Within 1000
nodes.description: Addition of numbers within 1000 with and without regrouping; estimation

nodes.label: Subtraction Within 1000
nodes.description: Subtraction of numbers within 1000 with and without regrouping; estimation

nodes.label: Multiplication Tables
nodes.description: Multiplication as equal groups; multiplication tables of 2, 3, 4, 5 and 10

nodes.label: Division
nodes.description: Division as sharing and grouping; relationship between multiplication and division

nodes.label: Mental Calculation
nodes.description: Mental addition and subtraction strategies; mental multiplication of single-digit numbers

nodes.label: Money (P2)
nodes.description: Adding and subtracting money in dollars and cents; solving word problems involving money

nodes.label: Introduction to Fractions
nodes.description: Equal parts of a whole; halves, thirds and quarters; naming and comparing unit fractions

nodes.label: Length and Mass (Standard Units)
nodes.description: Measure length in metres and centimetres; measure mass in kilograms and grams

nodes.label: Volume (Litres)
nodes.description: Measure volume in litres; compare volumes; solve word problems involving volume

nodes.label: Time (P2)
nodes.description: Tell time to 5 minutes; use a.m. and p.m.; duration of time in hours and minutes

nodes.label: 2D & 3D Shapes (P2)
nodes.description: Identify and describe 2D shapes (semicircle, quarter circle); identify flat and curved faces of 3D shapes

nodes.label: Lines and Surfaces
nodes.description: Identify straight and curved lines; flat and curved surfaces

nodes.label: Picture Graphs with Scales
nodes.description: Read and interpret picture graphs where each symbol represents more than 1 unit

nodes.label: Numbers to 10 000
nodes.description: Count, read and write numbers to 10 000; place value; compare, order and round numbers

nodes.label: Addition & Subtraction (P3)
nodes.description: Addition and subtraction of numbers up to 10 000; estimation; solving 2-step word problems

nodes.label: Multiplication Tables (6, 7, 8, 9)
nodes.description: Multiplication tables of 6, 7, 8 and 9; multiply a number up to 3 digits by a 1-digit number

nodes.label: Division (P3)
nodes.description: Divide a number up to 3 digits by a 1-digit number; division with remainder; quotient and remainder

nodes.label: Mental Calculation (P3)
nodes.description: Mental strategies for all four operations; use of number properties to simplify calculation

nodes.label: Money (P3)
nodes.description: Addition, subtraction, multiplication and division involving money; making change; word problems

nodes.label: Fractions (P3)
nodes.description: Equivalent fractions; comparing and ordering fractions; adding and subtracting like fractions

nodes.label: Length, Mass & Volume (P3)
nodes.description: Convert between km and m, kg and g, l and ml; four operations on measurement quantities

nodes.label: Time (P3)
nodes.description: Tell time to the minute; 24-hour clock; duration of time; conversion of hours and minutes

nodes.label: Angles
nodes.description: Identify angles as amount of turning; right angles; angles greater and smaller than a right angle

nodes.label: Perpendicular & Parallel Lines
nodes.description: Identify perpendicular and parallel lines; draw perpendicular and parallel lines

nodes.label: Area & Perimeter
nodes.description: Find area in square units and perimeter of rectilinear figures; area and perimeter of rectangles and squares

nodes.label: Bar Graphs
nodes.description: Read, interpret and draw bar graphs; solve problems using data from bar graphs

nodes.label: Numbers to 100 000
nodes.description: Count, read and write numbers to 100 000; place value; rounding numbers

nodes.label: Factors & Multiples
nodes.description: Determine factors and multiples; identify prime and composite numbers; common factors and multiples

nodes.label: Four Operations (P4)
nodes.description: Multiply and divide up to 4-digit numbers by a 1-digit or 2-digit number; order of operations; word problems

nodes.label: Fractions (P4)
nodes.description: Mixed numbers and improper fractions; add and subtract related fractions; fraction of a set of objects

nodes.label: Decimals
nodes.description: Decimals up to 2 decimal places; read, write, compare, order and round decimals; convert fractions to decimals

nodes.label: Decimal Operations (P4)
nodes.description: Add and subtract decimals up to 2 decimal places; multiply and divide decimals by a 1-digit number

nodes.label: Angles (P4)
nodes.description: Measure and draw angles using a protractor; relate turns to degrees; angles on a straight line and at a point

nodes.label: Properties of Rectangles & Squares
nodes.description: Properties of rectangles and squares; find unknown angles in rectangles and squares

nodes.label: Symmetry
nodes.description: Identify symmetric figures; draw lines of symmetry; complete symmetric figures

nodes.label: Area & Perimeter (P4)
nodes.description: Area and perimeter of composite figures made up of rectangles and squares

nodes.label: Tables & Line Graphs
nodes.description: Read and interpret tables and line graphs; complete tables; solve problems using data

nodes.label: Numbers to 10 Million
nodes.description: Read, write and represent numbers to 10 000 000; place value; rounding large numbers

nodes.label: Four Operations (P5)
nodes.description: Multiply and divide by 2-digit numbers; order of operations with brackets; multi-step word problems

nodes.label: Fractions (P5)
nodes.description: Add and subtract unlike fractions; multiply and divide fractions by a whole number; fraction word problems

nodes.label: Decimals (P5)
nodes.description: Decimals up to 3 decimal places; multiply and divide decimals by tens, hundreds, thousands; decimal word problems

nodes.label: Ratio
nodes.description: Concept of ratio; equivalent ratios; simplest form; ratio word problems involving two quantities

nodes.label: Percentage
nodes.description: Concept of percentage; express fractions and decimals as percentages; find percentage of a quantity

nodes.label: Rate
nodes.description: Concept of rate; solve word problems involving rate (speed, unit cost, etc.)

nodes.label: Angles in Triangles
nodes.description: Angle sum of a triangle; isosceles and equilateral triangle properties; find unknown angles

nodes.label: Angles in Quadrilaterals
nodes.description: Angle sum of a quadrilateral; properties of parallelogram, rhombus and trapezium; find unknown angles

nodes.label: Area of Triangle
nodes.description: Find the area of a triangle using base and height; composite figures involving triangles

nodes.label: Volume of Cube & Cuboid
nodes.description: Find volume of cubes and cuboids; relationship between 1 litre and 1000 cm³; volume word problems

nodes.label: Average
nodes.description: Concept of average; find average of a set of data; solve word problems involving average

nodes.label: Algebra (P6)
nodes.description: Use letters to represent unknown numbers; simplify simple algebraic expressions; solve simple linear equations

nodes.label: Fractions (P6)
nodes.description: Multiply and divide fractions by fractions; complex fraction word problems using model method

nodes.label: Ratio (P6)
nodes.description: Ratio involving 3 quantities; changing ratios; ratio and fraction word problems

nodes.label: Percentage (P6)
nodes.description: Percentage increase and decrease; discount, GST; word problems involving percentage

nodes.label: Speed
nodes.description: Relationship between speed, distance and time; average speed; word problems involving speed

nodes.label: Circles
nodes.description: Radius, diameter and circumference; area of circle; composite figures involving circles

nodes.label: Area & Circumference of Circle
nodes.description: Calculate area and circumference using pi; solve problems involving semicircles and quarter circles

nodes.label: Volume of Solids
nodes.description: Volume of cubes, cuboids and composite solids; word problems involving volume

nodes.label: Nets
nodes.description: Identify nets of cubes, cuboids, prisms and pyramids; visualise 3D shapes from nets

nodes.label: Pie Charts
nodes.description: Read and interpret pie charts; solve problems using data from pie charts

nodes.label: Primes, HCF & LCM
nodes.description: Prime factorisation; find HCF and LCM using prime factorisation; square roots and cube roots

nodes.label: Integers & Rational Numbers
nodes.description: Negative numbers; operations on integers and rational numbers; number line; ordering

nodes.label: Real Numbers
nodes.description: Irrational numbers; surds; rounding and significant figures; estimation

nodes.label: Ratio, Rate & Proportion
nodes.description: Ratios involving rational numbers; direct and inverse proportion; map scales

nodes.label: Percentage (O-Level)
nodes.description: Reverse percentage; percentage change; profit and loss; discount and GST; simple and compound interest

nodes.label: Speed (O-Level)
nodes.description: Speed, distance and time problems; average speed; conversion of units

nodes.label: Algebraic Expressions & Formulae
nodes.description: Simplify, expand and factorise algebraic expressions; algebraic fractions; substitution; formulae

nodes.label: Linear Equations & Inequalities
nodes.description: Solve linear equations in one variable; simultaneous linear equations; linear inequalities

nodes.label: Quadratic Equations
nodes.description: Solve quadratic equations by factorisation, completing the square and formula; form equations from word problems

nodes.label: Functions & Graphs
nodes.description: Linear, quadratic and simple power functions; graphs of y = ax^n; gradient of a curve; graph sketching

nodes.label: Indices
nodes.description: Laws of indices (positive, zero, negative and fractional); simplify expressions involving indices

nodes.label: Set Language & Notation
nodes.description: Set notation; union, intersection, complement; Venn diagrams with two or three sets

nodes.label: Matrices
nodes.description: Matrix notation; addition, subtraction and multiplication of matrices; identity and inverse matrices (2x2)

nodes.label: Number Patterns & Sequences
nodes.description: Number sequences and patterns; general term of a sequence (Tn); nth term formula

nodes.label: Angles & Polygons
nodes.description: Angle properties; angles at parallel lines; angle sum of polygons; interior and exterior angles of regular polygons

nodes.label: Congruence & Similarity
nodes.description: Congruent and similar figures; tests for congruent triangles; ratio of areas and volumes of similar figures

nodes.label: Pythagoras' Theorem
nodes.description: Use Pythagoras' theorem to find unknown sides; applications in 2D and 3D

nodes.label: Trigonometry (O-Level)
nodes.description: Trigonometric ratios (sin, cos, tan) for right-angled triangles; sine rule and cosine rule; area of triangle = 0.5ab sin C

nodes.label: Mensuration (2D)
nodes.description: Area and perimeter of triangles, quadrilaterals, circles, sectors and composite figures

nodes.label: Mensuration (3D)
nodes.description: Volume and surface area of prisms, cylinders, cones, pyramids and spheres; composite solids

nodes.label: Coordinate Geometry
nodes.description: Gradient of a line; length and midpoint of a line segment; equation of a straight line; parallel and perpendicular lines

nodes.label: Transformations
nodes.description: Translation, reflection, rotation and enlargement; describing transformations; combination of transformations

nodes.label: Vectors in 2D
nodes.description: Vector notation; addition and subtraction of vectors; scalar multiplication; position vectors

nodes.label: Data Handling
nodes.description: Collect, classify and tabulate data; interpret tables; frequency distribution

nodes.label: Statistical Diagrams
nodes.description: Bar graphs, pie charts, line graphs, histograms, stem-and-leaf diagrams, dot diagrams, box-and-whisker plots

nodes.label: Mean, Median, Mode & Range
nodes.description: Calculate mean, median, mode for grouped and ungrouped data; quartiles and interquartile range; standard deviation

nodes.label: Probability (O-Level)
nodes.description: Probability of single and combined events; addition and multiplication rules; tree diagrams; possibility diagrams

nodes.label: Problems in Real-World Contexts
nodes.description: Solve problems set in everyday contexts involving multiple mathematical concepts

nodes.label: Quadratic Functions & Inequalities
nodes.description: Conditions for real roots; maximum/minimum values; completing the square; sketching quadratic graphs; quadratic inequalities

nodes.label: Surds
nodes.description: Four operations on surds; rationalising the denominator; conjugate surds

nodes.label: Polynomials & Partial Fractions
nodes.description: Multiplication and division of polynomials; remainder and factor theorems; partial fractions

nodes.label: Binomial Theorem
nodes.description: Binomial expansion of (a + b)^n for positive integer n; general term; specific term

nodes.label: Indices & Surds Equations
nodes.description: Solve equations involving indices and surds; exponential equations

nodes.label: Logarithms
nodes.description: Logarithmic and exponential functions; laws of logarithms; change of base; solve logarithmic and exponential equations

nodes.label: Simultaneous Equations (A-Math)
nodes.description: Simultaneous equations in two variables (one linear, one non-linear)

nodes.label: Modulus Functions
nodes.description: Graphs of modulus functions; solve equations and inequalities involving modulus

nodes.label: Power, Exponential & Logarithmic Graphs
nodes.description: Graphs of y = ax^n, y = a^x, y = log_a(x); use of graphs to solve equations

nodes.label: Linear Law
nodes.description: Reduce non-linear relationships to linear form; use linear law to estimate values

nodes.label: Trigonometric Functions & Identities
nodes.description: Six trigonometric functions; graphs of trig functions; amplitude and period; basic trig identities

nodes.label: Trigonometric Equations
nodes.description: Solve trigonometric equations in a given interval; principal and general solutions

nodes.label: Addition Formulae
nodes.description: Addition formulae sin(A ± B), cos(A ± B), tan(A ± B); double angle formulae; R-formula

nodes.label: Coordinate Geometry (A-Math)
nodes.description: Equation of a circle; linear and non-linear intersection; perpendicular distance; area of rectilinear figures

nodes.label: Proofs in Plane Geometry
nodes.description: Properties of parallel lines and triangles; midpoint theorem; tangent-chord angle; similar and congruent triangles

nodes.label: Differentiation
nodes.description: Derivative of x^n, sin x, cos x, tan x, e^x, ln x; chain rule, product rule, quotient rule

nodes.label: Applications of Differentiation
nodes.description: Tangents and normals; increasing/decreasing functions; stationary points; maxima and minima; rates of change; connected rates of change

nodes.label: Integration
nodes.description: Integration as reverse of differentiation; indefinite integrals of x^n, sin x, cos x, e^x, 1/x; integration of (ax+b)^n

nodes.label: Definite Integrals & Applications
nodes.description: Definite integrals; area under a curve; area between two curves; kinematics (displacement, velocity, acceleration)

nodes.label: Functions
nodes.description: Concept of function; domain and range; one-to-one and many-to-one; composite functions; inverse functions

nodes.label: Graphing Techniques
nodes.description: Graphs of standard functions; transformations of graphs (y = f(x) ± a, y = f(x ± a), y = af(x), y = f(ax)); asymptotes

nodes.label: Equations & Inequalities
nodes.description: Solve equations and inequalities involving modulus, rational expressions; conditions for real roots; discriminant

nodes.label: Sequences & Series
nodes.description: Arithmetic and geometric progressions; sum to n terms; sum to infinity; convergence; sigma notation

nodes.label: Summation of Series
nodes.description: Method of differences; use of standard results for sum of r, r^2, r^3; telescoping sums

nodes.label: Mathematical Induction
nodes.description: Principle of mathematical induction; prove statements involving summation, divisibility and inequalities

nodes.label: Recurrence Relations
nodes.description: Formulate and use recurrence relations; solve simple recurrence relations

nodes.label: Vectors in 3D
nodes.description: 3D vectors; addition, subtraction, scalar multiplication; position vectors; unit vectors; section formula

nodes.label: Scalar (Dot) Product
nodes.description: Scalar product of two vectors; angle between vectors; perpendicularity; projection

nodes.label: Vector (Cross) Product
nodes.description: Cross product of two vectors; area of parallelogram and triangle; perpendicular vector to a plane

nodes.label: Lines & Planes
nodes.description: Vector and Cartesian equations of lines and planes; intersections; angle between line and plane; distance from point to line/plane

nodes.label: Complex Numbers
nodes.description: Complex numbers in Cartesian form a + bi; four operations; conjugate; modulus and argument

nodes.label: Polar & Exponential Form
nodes.description: Polar (trigonometric) and exponential forms of complex numbers; multiplication and division in polar form

nodes.label: Complex Roots of Equations
nodes.description: Roots of polynomial equations with real coefficients; conjugate root theorem; De Moivre's theorem; roots of unity

nodes.label: Argand Diagram & Loci
nodes.description: Represent complex numbers on Argand diagram; loci such as |z - a| = r, arg(z - a) = theta

nodes.label: Differentiation (H2)
nodes.description: Differentiation of standard functions; product, quotient and chain rules; implicit differentiation; parametric differentiation

nodes.label: Maclaurin Series
nodes.description: Maclaurin series for standard functions; general Maclaurin expansion; use of standard series to find other expansions

nodes.label: Applications of Differentiation (H2)
nodes.description: Tangent and normal; stationary points; maxima/minima; rates of change; connected rates of change

nodes.label: Integration Techniques (H2)
nodes.description: Integration of standard functions; integration by substitution; integration by parts; use of partial fractions

nodes.label: Definite Integrals (H2)
nodes.description: Properties of definite integrals; area under and between curves; volume of revolution

nodes.label: Differential Equations
nodes.description: First order separable differential equations; formulate and solve differential equations; family of solution curves

nodes.label: Permutations
nodes.description: Counting principle; permutations; arrangements with restrictions; circular permutations

nodes.label: Combinations
nodes.description: Combinations; selection with restrictions; distinguishing between permutations and combinations

nodes.label: Probability (H2)
nodes.description: Addition and multiplication rules; mutually exclusive and independent events; conditional probability

nodes.label: Bayes' Theorem
nodes.description: Bayes' theorem; tree diagrams for conditional probability; posterior probabilities

nodes.label: Discrete Random Variables
nodes.description: Probability distribution; expectation E(X) and variance Var(X); E(aX+b) and Var(aX+b)

nodes.label: Binomial Distribution
nodes.description: Binomial distribution B(n,p); conditions; mean and variance; use of tables or GC

nodes.label: Poisson Distribution
nodes.description: Poisson distribution Po(lambda); conditions; mean and variance; additive property

nodes.label: Normal Distribution
nodes.description: Normal distribution N(mu, sigma^2); standard normal Z; use of GC for normal probabilities; inverse normal

nodes.label: Normal Approximations
nodes.description: Normal approximation to binomial and Poisson distributions; continuity correction

nodes.label: Sampling
nodes.description: Population and sample; random sampling; sample mean distribution; Central Limit Theorem

nodes.label: Hypothesis Testing (Z-test)
nodes.description: Null and alternative hypotheses; significance level; Z-test for population mean; one-tail and two-tail tests; p-value

nodes.label: Hypothesis Testing (t-test)
nodes.description: t-test for population mean with unknown variance; t-distribution; degrees of freedom

nodes.label: Confidence Intervals
nodes.description: Confidence interval for population mean; interpretation of confidence intervals

nodes.label: Correlation
nodes.description: Scatter diagrams; product moment correlation coefficient; interpretation of r

nodes.label: Linear Regression
nodes.description: Least squares regression line; use of regression line for prediction; interpolation and extrapolation

nodes.label: Comparing & Ordering
nodes.description: Compare and order numbers to 100; use symbols > < =; number patterns

nodes.label: Multiplication Word Problems
nodes.description: Solve word problems involving multiplication of 2, 3, 4, 5 and 10

nodes.label: Division Word Problems
nodes.description: Solve word problems involving division; sharing and grouping problems

nodes.label: 2-Step Word Problems
nodes.description: Solve 2-step word problems involving four operations; model drawing method

nodes.label: Model Method (P4)
nodes.description: Use bar models to solve multi-step word problems involving four operations, fractions and decimals

nodes.label: Time (P4)
nodes.description: Time in 24-hour clock; conversion of time units; word problems involving time and duration

nodes.label: Model Method (P5)
nodes.description: Use bar models for complex word problems involving ratio, percentage, fractions

nodes.label: Conversion of Units
nodes.description: Convert between different units of measurement; compound units (e.g. km/h, m/s)

nodes.label: Order of Operations (P6)
nodes.description: Apply BODMAS/order of operations in complex expressions involving brackets

nodes.label: Model Method (P6)
nodes.description: Advanced bar model problems; before-after concept; branch method for challenging word problems

nodes.label: Tessellations
nodes.description: Identify tessellations; create tessellation patterns using basic shapes

nodes.label: Solid Figures & Nets
nodes.description: Draw and identify nets of prisms and pyramids; visualise 3D solids from 2D representations

nodes.label: Standard Form
nodes.description: Express numbers in standard form A × 10^n; operations in standard form

nodes.label: Algebraic Fractions
nodes.description: Simplify, add, subtract, multiply and divide algebraic fractions

nodes.label: Factorisation
nodes.description: Factorise by common factor, grouping, difference of two squares, perfect squares, cross method

nodes.label: Simultaneous Linear Equations
nodes.description: Solve simultaneous linear equations by substitution and elimination; graphical method

nodes.label: Direct & Inverse Proportion
nodes.description: Identify and apply direct and inverse proportion; graphical representation

nodes.label: Arc Length & Sector Area
nodes.description: Calculate arc length and area of a sector; problems involving sectors and segments

nodes.label: Circle Properties
nodes.description: Angle properties of circles; tangent-radius property; angles in semicircle, same segment, opposite segments

nodes.label: Scale Drawings & Maps
nodes.description: Interpret and construct scale drawings; map scales and bearings

nodes.label: Simple & Compound Interest
nodes.description: Calculate simple and compound interest; hire purchase; money exchange

nodes.label: Cumulative Frequency
nodes.description: Draw and interpret cumulative frequency curves; find median and quartiles from curve

nodes.label: Graphs in Practical Situations
nodes.description: Distance-time and speed-time graphs; conversion graphs; interpret real-world graphs

nodes.label: Estimation & Approximation
nodes.description: Round to significant figures and decimal places; estimate results of computations

nodes.label: Bearing
nodes.description: Three-figure bearings; solve problems involving bearing using trigonometry

nodes.label: Remainder & Factor Theorems
nodes.description: Use remainder theorem and factor theorem to factorise polynomials; solve polynomial equations

nodes.label: Power Geometry & Circles
nodes.description: Equation of circle; tangent to circle; intersection of line and circle

nodes.label: Kinematics
nodes.description: Displacement, velocity, acceleration using differentiation and integration

nodes.label: Connected Rates of Change
nodes.description: Problems involving related rates using chain rule

nodes.label: Small Angle Approximations
nodes.description: sin x ≈ x, cos x ≈ 1 - x^2/2, tan x ≈ x for small x

nodes.label: Partial Fractions (H2)
nodes.description: Decompose rational functions into partial fractions; repeated and irreducible quadratic factors

nodes.label: System of Linear Equations
nodes.description: Solve 3×3 systems using GC; interpret geometrically (unique, infinite, no solution)

nodes.label: Binomial Expansion (H2)
nodes.description: Binomial series for rational n; validity of expansion; approximations

nodes.label: Curve Sketching
nodes.description: Asymptotes; behaviour at infinity; stationary points; general shape of rational functions

nodes.label: Parametric Equations
nodes.description: Parametric representation of curves; conversion between parametric and Cartesian forms; differentiation of parametric equations

nodes.label: Implicit Differentiation
nodes.description: Differentiate implicitly defined functions; find tangent and normal to implicit curves

nodes.label: Volume of Revolution
nodes.description: Volume of revolution about x-axis and y-axis using disc and shell methods

nodes.label: Probability Distributions Overview
nodes.description: Properties of probability distributions; discrete vs continuous; cumulative distribution functions

nodes.label: Unbiased Estimates
nodes.description: Unbiased estimates of population mean and variance from sample data

nodes.label: Chi-Squared Goodness of Fit
nodes.description: Chi-squared test for goodness of fit; degrees of freedom; contingency tables

nodes.label: Odd & Even Numbers
nodes.description: Identify odd and even numbers; properties of odd and even numbers

nodes.label: Number Patterns (P3)
nodes.description: Identify and complete number patterns; describe rules for number sequences

nodes.label: Estimation (P4)
nodes.description: Estimate answers by rounding; check reasonableness of answers

nodes.label: Negative Numbers
nodes.description: Concept of negative numbers; number line with negative numbers; temperature below zero

nodes.label: Algebraic Expansion
nodes.description: Expand products of algebraic expressions; special products (a+b)^2, (a-b)^2, (a+b)(a-b)

nodes.label: Completing the Square
nodes.description: Complete the square for quadratic expressions; relate to graph of quadratic function

nodes.label: Quadratic Graphs
nodes.description: Sketch and interpret graphs of quadratic functions; vertex, axis of symmetry, x-intercepts

nodes.label: Gradient of a Straight Line
nodes.description: Find and interpret gradient; equation y = mx + c; parallel and perpendicular gradients

nodes.label: Area & Volume of Similar Figures
nodes.description: Ratio of areas = k^2; ratio of volumes = k^3; solve problems on similar figures

nodes.label: Trigonometry in 3D
nodes.description: Apply trigonometry to solve problems in 3D; angle between line and plane

nodes.label: Equations Involving Surds
nodes.description: Solve equations containing surds by squaring; extraneous solutions

nodes.label: Discriminant & Nature of Roots
nodes.description: Use discriminant b^2 - 4ac to determine nature of roots; conditions for tangency

nodes.label: Double Angle Formulae
nodes.description: sin 2A, cos 2A, tan 2A; use in simplification and solving equations

nodes.label: R-formula
nodes.description: Express a sin x + b cos x in the form R sin(x ± alpha) or R cos(x ± alpha)

nodes.label: Second Derivative
nodes.description: Second derivative test for maxima and minima; concavity

nodes.label: Tangents & Normals
nodes.description: Find equations of tangent and normal to a curve at a given point

nodes.label: Inverse Functions
nodes.description: Conditions for inverse to exist; find inverse functions; self-inverse functions; relationship between f and f^-1

nodes.label: Composite Functions
nodes.description: Existence of composite functions; domain and range of composite; decomposition

nodes.label: AP & GP Applications
nodes.description: Applications of arithmetic and geometric progressions; sum to infinity in real contexts

nodes.label: Integration by Parts
nodes.description: Apply integration by parts formula; repeated integration by parts; tabular method

nodes.label: Integration by Substitution
nodes.description: Use substitution to evaluate integrals; trigonometric substitutions

nodes.label: Conditional Probability
nodes.description: P(A|B); independent events; use of Venn diagrams and tree diagrams for conditional probability

nodes.label: Expectation & Variance
nodes.description: E(aX+b), Var(aX+b); E(X+Y), Var(X+Y) for independent variables; properties of linear combinations

nodes.label: Word Problems (P1)
nodes.description: Solve simple 1-step word problems involving addition and subtraction

nodes.label: Model Drawing (P3)
nodes.description: Use bar model method to represent and solve word problems

nodes.label: Rate (P6)
nodes.description: Problems involving rates; unit rate; comparing rates

nodes.label: Decimal Operations (P6)
nodes.description: Multiply and divide decimals by decimals; complex decimal word problems

nodes.label: Number Line
nodes.description: Represent numbers (integers, fractions, decimals, irrationals) on a number line

nodes.label: Absolute Value
nodes.description: Concept of |x|; solve simple equations and inequalities involving absolute value

nodes.label: Geometric Construction
nodes.description: Construct angle bisectors, perpendicular bisectors, parallel lines using compasses and straightedge

nodes.label: Loci
nodes.description: Describe and sketch loci in 2D; intersection of loci

nodes.label: Nets & Surface Area (O-Level)
nodes.description: Identify nets of 3D solids; calculate surface area from nets

nodes.label: Partial Fractions (A-Math)
nodes.description: Decompose into partial fractions with linear and repeated linear factors

nodes.label: Exponential Growth & Decay
nodes.description: Model and solve problems involving exponential growth and decay; half-life

nodes.label: Modulus Functions (H2)
nodes.description: Graphs of |f(x)| and f(|x|); solve equations and inequalities involving modulus

nodes.label: Transformations of Graphs (H2)
nodes.description: y = f(x) + a, y = f(x + a), y = af(x), y = f(ax), y = f(-x), y = -f(x); combinations

nodes.label: Linear Combinations of RV
nodes.description: Distribution of aX + bY for normal random variables; sums of independent normal variables
